1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m2 (will filter by kommunenummer obtained in step 1)

8.description: collapse to one row per parcel with minimum distance

9.description: sort parcels by min distance ascending

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m2 (filter by kommunenummer obtained in step 1)

4.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year flood polygons (reduce to parcels intersecting flomareal)

6.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to Drammen municipality extent (using step 1 municipality geometry)

7.description: compute nearest quick-clay distance for each parcel that intersects flood zones

8.description: collapse to one row per parcel using MIN(distance) to handle duplicates from spatial joins

9.description: sort parcels by ascending distance to quick-clay hazard

iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"flomsoner","purpose":"get 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall=200)"},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","purpose":"get parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m2 (filter by kommunenummer obtained in step 1)"},{"step":4,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"find parcels that intersect 200-year flood polygons (reduce to parcels intersecting flomareal)"},{"step":5,"action":"query","database":"kvikkleire","purpose":"get quick-clay hazard polygons (kartleggingsomrade)"},{"step":6,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"reduce quick-clay polygons to Drammen municipality extent (using step 1 municipality geometry)"},{"step":7,"action":"nearest","database":null,"purpose":"compute nearest quick-clay distance for each parcel that intersects flood zones"},{"step":8,"action":"aggregate","database":null,"purpose":"collapse to one row per parcel using MIN(distance) to handle duplicates from spatial joins"},{"step":9,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"sort parcels by ascending distance to quick-clay hazard"},{"step":10,"action":"limit","database":null,"purpose":"return top 10 parcels"}]}
